# Meeting room name change

Rename one shared room while the old sign remains visible for a short handoff.

## Before

- Record the current bookings
- List teams using the room

## Steps

1. Post the new room name
2. Update future bookings
3. Remove the old sign

## Keep

> Existing bookings must keep their original times.

## Done when

- New notices use one room name
- Reception has the updated map

## Record

```text
Owner: Office team | Status: confirmed
```

# Supply cabinet relabeling

Move shared supplies to clearer shelves without interrupting the morning shift.

## Before

- Photograph the current shelves
- Count frequently used items

## Steps

1. Place temporary labels
2. Move one shelf at a time
3. Remove outdated labels

## Keep

> Keep daily supplies available during the move.

## Done when

- Every shelf has one label
- The stock sheet matches the cabinet

## Record

```text
Owner: Facilities | Status: checked
```

# Emergency contact card update

Add one missing contact label in small groups before printing the next card set.

## Before

- Count cards missing a label
- Confirm the approved wording

## Steps

1. Update one small group
2. Review the remaining cards
3. Print the approved set

## Keep

> Do not replace a label that is already correct.

## Done when

- Existing labels remain unchanged
- The update log names each group

## Record

```text
Owner: People team | Status: reviewed
```

# Duplicate supply request issue

Trace why one paper request can appear twice on the weekly order sheet.

## Evidence

> Request SR-18 appeared in two rows after one handoff.

---

## Reproduce

1. Open the order sheet
2. Copy the afternoon notes
3. Review request `SR-18`

## What changes

- Keep one sheet owner
- Preserve the original request date

## Verification

- Compare label `SR-18`
- Confirm status `ready`

# Missing handoff note issue

Trace why one closing note can disappear before the morning team reads it.

## Evidence

> The morning board did not show note H-24 after the evening close.

2. Post note `H-24`

- Preserve the closing timestamp

## Verification

- Find label `H-24`
- Confirm state `posted`
